plan.title: Second Low-Risk Move Plan
plan.purpose: Plan the second low-risk move wave. No application authorized.

candidate.reason: No remaining preferred-root candidate is small, docs-only or evidence-only, low-risk, and reference-simple enough for a second move plan after AIDE-MOVE-01.

considered_candidates.reason: Remaining IDE material is machine-readable projection metadata explicitly deferred by prior gates.
All tracked files are Python modules; product/client imports and AuditX references make this an active tooling/source move, not a docs-only plan.
Validation root contains active validation modules and broad XStack references.
Governance root contains policy/governance Python modules, not docs-only evidence.
Meta root contains many policy/governance Python modules and high reference volume.

blockers: No preferred-root docs-only or evidence-only candidate remains after the IDE README move.
Remaining preferred-root candidates are machine-readable metadata or active Python/tooling modules.
Reference complexity is too high for a second low-risk move plan without refinement.
